titles.title: Providing for consideration of the bill (H.R. 2913) to authorize support for Ukraine, and for other purposes.
Providing for consideration of the bill (H.R. 2913) to authorize support for Ukraine, and for other purposes.

action.text: Referred to the House Committee on Rules.
Motion to Discharge Committee filed by Mr. Meeks. Petition No: 119-8.
Motion to discharge the Committee on Rules filed by Mr. Meeks. Assigned to the Discharge Calendar, Calendar No. 6.

NOTIFICATION OF INTENT TO OFFER MOTION TO DISCHARGE - Mr. Meeks notified the House of his intent to offer a motion to discharge the Committee on Rules from further consideration of H. Res. 518 pursuant to clause 2(c) of rule XV.
MOTION TO DISCHARGE COMMITTEE - Pursuant to clause 2 of rule XV, Mr. Meeks called up motion No. 6, to discharge the Committee on Rules from further consideration of H. Res. 518.
DEBATE - Pursuant to the rule, the House proceeded with 20 minutes of debate on the Meeks motion to discharge.
On motion to discharge Agreed to by the Yeas and Nays: 218 - 204 (Roll no. 200).
Consideration initiated from the Discharge Calendar.
DEBATE - The House proceeded with one hour of debate on H. Res. 518.
The previous question was ordered without objection.

POSTPONED PROCEEDINGS - At the conclusion of debate on H. Res. 518, the Chair put the question on agreeing to the resolution and by voice vote, announced the noes had prevailed. Mr. Meeks demanded the yeas and nays and the Chair postponed further proceedings until a time to be announced.

vote.text: On agreeing to the resolution Agreed to by the Yeas and Nays: 216 - 204 (Roll no. 206).

action.text: Motion to reconsider laid on the table Agreed to without objection.

bill.summary: This resolution provides for the consideration of H.R. 2913, the Ukraine Support Act. It also provides that the Clerk of the House shall transmit to the Senate a message that the House has passed H.R. 2913 no later than one week after the bill's passage.
